name: Forcefeminization
description:
You wake up in a facility dedicated to turning you into a proper woman.

Content Warning: Kidnapping, Nonconsenual drug use, Transformation, Genderbend, Misgendering, Sexism, Traditional gender roles, Possible Dubcon/Noncon, Possible Objectification, Possible breeding mentions.

Intro 1: Male Pov, transformation into a woman.

Intro 2: Fem Pov, tomboy/gnc user is forcibly feminized.

This is based on my other scenario about the other way around.
creator: Kittipaws
